title: Missing Weapons
description: This mod provides to add anomalies that shouldn't exist.
body:
This mod provides to add very strong weapons to every mini-boss/boss loot. Every "Missing Weapon" has a unique combat movement. For now there is a Missing Weapon for:
- Elder Guardian
- Evoker*
- Warden*
- Wither
- Ender Dragon

[ * ] Dropped only if killed by a Player

All these mobs have a 1% chance to drop his current Missing Weapon.

P.S.
Looting Enchantment doesn't provide to increase the drop chance.
